visual: Raises one knee high as the fist drops vertically into the open palm at waist height, producing an audible clap — the signature opening of Chen-style.
motion_description: Starting with both arms rising to chest height, the torso rotates left as weight shifts to the left leg. The body then continuously pivots back to the right while weight transfers to the right leg and the left foot steps forward, with the arms sweeping in a slow, circular motion. The sequence completes as the right knee lifts high and the right hand forms a raised fist, before dropping sharply as the foot lands and the right fist strikes vertically into the open left palm at waist height.
